rulings.Case Title: DR. & MRS. BENJAMIN YANG, L.AC.O.M.D ET AL VS. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY, A CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 6, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact with admissible competent evidence. PG&E's easement did not limit the installation (etc¿) of the pole for the transmission and distribution of electricity to a particular location within the easement. No binding contract for the relocation of the pole has been formed for lack of consideration. Yang Deposition 174: 15-21. Anglo California Nat. Bank of San Francisco v. Far West Lumber Co. (1957) 152 Cal.App.2d 284.= (501/REQ)
